task_completion.description: Agent initiated the creation of a Virtual Product.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page header displays 'New Virtual Product' or the 'Add Product' dropdown shows 'Virtual Product' being selected.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct Product Name and SKU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Product Name' input field contains exactly 'Professional Home Theater Installation' and the 'SKU' field contains 'SVC-HT-INSTALL'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct Price and Quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Price' input field contains '199' or '199.00' and the 'Quantity' field contains '100'.
The 'Categories' field shows 'Electronics' as a selected tag or checked in the category dropdown tree.

task_completion.description: Agent set the visibility to 'Catalog, Search'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Visibility' dropdown is set to 'Catalog, Search'.
A green success banner stating 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the page, or the new product appears in the Catalog Products grid.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the Magento Admin panel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser interface navigating the Magento Admin GUI, rather than a terminal executing CLI commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the genuine Magento product form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields for Name, SKU, Price, etc., are part of the actual Magento product creation page, not a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: No evidence of DOM manipulation to fake success.
integrity.visual_evidence: The success message and UI elements align perfectly with Magento's standard layout and styling without broken CSS, browser developer tools open, or out-of-place text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: SKU is 'SVC-HT-INSTALL', Name is 'Professional Home Theater Installation', Product Type is 'virtual', Price is '199.00', Quantity is '100', Category is 'Electronics', and Visibility is 'Catalog, Search' (internal value 4). The agent must use the Magento Admin GUI to create this product.
